name: property managers processing 5–15 properties annually tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 properties annually, the complexity of tax reporting causes missed deadlines. We automate the report submission instead of manual compilation and submission of tax reports.
problem_solved: Compiling and submitting annual property tax reports is time-consuming and prone to errors.
features: manual data entry for property details

locked_fields.primary_problem: Compiling and submitting annual property tax reports is time-consuming and prone to errors.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 properties annually, the complexity of tax reporting causes missed deadlines. We automate the report submission instead of manual compilation and submission of tax reports.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual compilation and submission of tax reports
must_have_features: manual data entry for property details
